title: Interrupted live run was marked resumable from runner_completed without runner result evidence
description: After the operator interrupted a live docs run during `runner_started`, the persisted run state claimed the run could resume from `runner_completed` even though no `runner.result.json` existed and the runner stage had not completed cleanly.
reproductionNotes: Interrupt `pnpm gdh run runs/fixtures/dogfood/demo-walkthrough-clarity.md --runner codex-cli --approval-mode fail --json` mid-run, then inspect `gdh status` and the persisted `run.json`.
suspectedCause: Interrupted-stage reconciliation promotes the pending stage too optimistically instead of requiring a full runner completion bundle.
